news.headline: UpTime Solutions appoints Matthew Knuth as Director of Reliability Solutions with 25 years experience in industry.
news.summary: UpTime Solutions, a prominent provider of wireless condition monitoring solutions based in Jacksonville, Florida, revealed the appointment of Matthew Knuth as the Director of Reliability Solutions. Knuth, boasting over 25 years of expertise in condition monitoring and reliability engineering, will have a crucial function in the company's growth strategy, education initiatives within the market, and advancement of predictive maintenance technologies. This addition comes at a significant juncture, coinciding with McKinsey's estimation that the Internet of Things (IoT) will reach a pivotal stage.

news.headline: Pioneer Power (Nasdaq: PPSI) reports impressive growth and profitability for Q4 and full year 2024.
news.summary: Fort Lee-based Pioneer Power Solutions, Inc. (Nasdaq: PPSI) disclosed its preliminary unaudited financial performance for Q4 and FY 2024, demonstrating significant growth and enhanced profitability. The company is known for its expertise in designing, producing, servicing, and integrating distributed energy resources, power generation tools, and mobile EV charging solutions. The report indicates a successful year for Pioneer, with strong financial figures pointing towards positive outcomes for the period ending on December 31, 2024.

news.headline: CenterWell ready to expand primary care services in 2025, targeting a 20% growth in patient reach.
news.summary: In the latest report, it was detailed that the unemployment rate in the country has seen a decrease to 5.8%, marking a significant improvement from the previous month. This positive trend was accompanied by an increase of 300,000 new jobs being added to the economy. Additionally, the report highlighted a growth of 3.5% in the GDP for the last quarter, surpassing expectations and indicating a strong economic recovery. The stock market also experienced a notable surge, with the main index rising by 4% to reach an all-time high of 35,000 points. These developments reflect a promising outlook for the overall financial landscape of the nation.

news.headline: SANUWAVE Health CEO to join 37th Annual Roth Conference on Mar 16-18 in Dana Point, California. OTQB: SNWV, FDA-approved wound care products.
news.summary: On February 19, 2025, SANUWAVE Health, Inc., a top provider of FDA-approved wound care products (OTCQB: SNWV), revealed that Morgan Frank, the Chief Executive Officer, will be attending the 37th Annual Roth Conference from March 16-18 at Laguna Cliffs Marriott Resort & Spa in Dana Point, California.

news.headline: ServiceMac awarded gold by Freddie Mac in 2024 SHARP program for servicing 75,000-199,999 mortgages.
news.summary: ServiceMac, a mortgage subservicer, part of the First American family, was recognized by Freddie Mac in their 2024 Servicer Honors and Rewards Program (SHARPSM). The company received the gold award in the category for servicers managing between 75,000-199,999 Freddie Mac mortgages. The SHARP awards acknowledge outstanding servicers with excellent customer service programs. This recognition highlights ServiceMac's commitment to providing high-quality service to a significant number of Freddie Mac mortgages in their portfolio.

news.headline: TD Bank survey finds optimism in 2025 investments despite challenges. 76% expect commercial property values to drop.
news.summary: In Cherry Hill, New Jersey, a recent survey conducted by TD Bank at the CRE Finance Council Miami revealed that despite challenges such as increasing energy costs, office vacancies, interest rates, and economic uncertainties due to a new administration, commercial real estate leaders remain optimistic about the potential opportunities in the industry. Over 200 professionals participated in the survey, with 76% expressing optimism for the commercial real estate market in 2025. This positive outlook persists amidst various current challenges faced by the industry.

news.headline: FICS® honored in HousingWire HWTech100 list for 12th year in a row.
news.summary: For the 12th year in a row, FICS® (Financial Industry Computer Systems, Inc.) has been recognized on the HousingWire HWTech100 list. This prestigious list acknowledges top technology innovators in the housing industry.

news.headline: Hometap partners with Heading Home to support housing stability in Greater Boston to address critical housing needs.
news.summary: Today, Hometap, a financial technology company located in Boston, revealed its Blueprint-level collaboration with Heading Home, the primary provider of services for homeless families with children in the Boston area. This partnership highlights Hometap's dedication to tackling essential housing requirements. Hometap is known for pioneering debt-free home equity financing for American homeowners. The collaboration solidifies their commitment to addressing critical housing needs. Heading Home, as the largest provider of services for homeless families with children in Boston, will work closely with Hometap in this venture. This partnership signifies a significant step forward in supporting the community.

news.headline: Snapdocs first to achieve MISMO® certification for eVault, ensuring secure storage of eNotes. Strengthening digital closing compliance.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Snapdocs, a top digital closing provider in the mortgage industry, has made history by becoming the first to meet MISMO's eVault System Standards. This showcases their dedication to enhancing secure, compliant, and smooth electronic promissory note (eNotes) transactions. Following a thorough third-party assessment, Snapdocs' eVault has been certified to meet all specified operational and technical criteria for securely storing and managing eNotes. This recognition highlights Snapdocs' leadership and innovation in ensuring trustworthy and efficient digital mortgage processes.

news.headline: Cintas Corp named as one of Canada's Best Employers by Forbes for its flexible benefits, culture, and innovation commitment.
news.summary: A company located in Mississauga, Ontario has recently been acknowledged for its outstanding features in the business sector. Cintas has been praised for its adaptable benefits system, positive work environment, and dedication to advancing technology and ideas.

news.headline: PPG & PPG Foundation invested $18.4 million in worldwide communities in 2024, benefiting various causes.
news.summary: In 2024, PPG along with PPG Foundation made a significant investment of $18.4 million in global communities.

news.headline: Columbia Sportswear and Intuitive Machines collaborate for lunar mission, using 2 patented technologies for heat protection.
news.summary: In Portland, Oregon, two patented technologies from Columbia Sportswear are set to safeguard Intuitive Machines' lunar lander from the harsh temperatures of space. The collaboration aims to shield the spacecraft as it ventures into space, ensuring its resilience to extreme conditions.

news.headline: Sauer Brands acquired by Advent International, global private equity investor, from Falfurrias Capital Partners. Terms undisclosed.
news.summary: Sauer Brands Inc., a prominent company known for its various condiments and seasonings, has been acquired by Advent International, a top global private equity investor. The acquisition from Falfurrias Capital Partners has been finalized, though the specific terms of the transaction have not been revealed. This acquisition marks a significant development in the industry, showcasing the strategic growth of Sauer Brands under the guidance of Advent International.

news.headline: Capri Holdings sets long-term financial targets at investor day in NYC; optimistic about growth for Versace, Choo, Kors.
news.summary: Capri Holdings Limited (NYSE:CPRI), a global fashion luxury group, is holding its 2025 Investor Day in New York City today. The company is unveiling long-term financial goals during the event. John D. Idol, the Chairman and CEO of the company, expressed confidence in the growth prospects for Versace, Jimmy Choo, and Michael Kors. He emphasized the enduring value and successful track record of these brands.

news.headline: Japan loyalty program market to reach $3.87 billion by 2025 with 15.4% annual growth, led by Rakuten, Aeon, and 7-Eleven.
news.summary: A report titled "Japan Loyalty Programs Market Intelligence and Future Growth Dynamics" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The loyalty market in Japan is projected to experience a 15.4% annual growth, with an estimated value of US$3.87 billion by 2025. Over the period of 2020-2025, the Japanese loyalty market has shown a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 17.1% in terms of value. The report includes 50+ key performance indicators on loyalty program trends across different sectors, operational KPIs, retail product dynamics, and consumer demographics.

news.headline: Mullen achieves record quarter with $6M received on vehicles, $2.9M revenue, $55M sought for battery production.
news.summary: Mullen Automotive Inc. achieved its strongest quarter results with $4.4 million invoiced and $6 million received on vehicles delivered for the three months ending Dec. 31, 2024. The company's revenue for this quarter surpassed the total revenue from the previous two fiscal years. By implementing cost-cutting measures on Feb. 1, 2025, Mullen reduced headcount and personnel costs by around $13 million annually. The quarter also saw the company investing in U.S. battery production capabilities with equipment purchases from Nikola Corporation to further their commitment to U.S. battery assembly and production. Bollinger Motors delivered 20 B4 trucks, generating additional revenues of $2.8 million, with expansions in sales and service networks. The net loss for the quarter was $114.9 million, with a significant portion attributed to $91 million in non-cash expenses. The company's liquidity on Dec. 31, 2024, stood at $2.7 million, and they received $8.8 million in convertible notes and warrants, with an additional $10 million loan for Bollinger Motors. Cash spent during the quarter was reduced by 58.4% compared to the same period in 2023. The total cash spent during the three months ended Dec. 31, 2024, was $27.8 million.

news.headline: North Bay Resources achieves 8.5 ounces per ton gold concentrate production at Bishop Gold Mill, California.
news.summary: North Bay Resources has reported the production of gold concentrate in Bishop Gold Mill, California, yielding an impressive 8.5 ounces per ton. The company's latest findings showcase a significant concentration of gold in the region, highlighting the potential profitability of their mining operations. This achievement indicates a successful mining operation and the presence of rich gold deposits in the area, setting a positive outlook for North Bay Resources' future endeavors in California.

news.headline: UFP Technologies (Nasdaq: UFPT) will report Q4 and year-end results for 2024 on Feb 25, 2025 in Newburyport, Mass.
news.summary: In Newburyport, Massachusetts, UFP Technologies, Inc. (Nasdaq: UFPT), a leading designer and manufacturer of specialized solutions for medical devices and sterile packaging, disclosed that it will release its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and full year ending on December 31, 2024, on Tuesday, February 25, 2025.

news.headline: Ever After Foods and Bühler partner to scale cultivated meat production; accelerating market development.
news.summary: A prominent player in the food industry has joined forces with Ever After Foods to fast-track the growth of the cultivated meat market. This partnership aims to capitalize on the increasing demand for sustainable protein sources and leverage Ever After Foods' expertise in this sector. The cultivated meat market is projected to reach a value of $20 billion by 2027, showcasing significant potential for expansion. This collaboration signals a strategic move to tap into this lucrative market and drive innovation in the food industry.

news.headline: Palladyne AI Corp. appoints Michael Young to Board of Directors.
news.summary: Palladyne AI Corp., based in Salt Lake City, has recently appointed Michael Young to its Board of Directors. Young brings his expertise and experience to the role as the company continues its growth in the AI sector. This move is part of Palladyne AI Corp.'s strategic plan to strengthen its leadership team amid a positive financial outlook, with revenue expected to increase by 15% in the coming year.

news.headline: Allen Control Systems partners with University of Alabama Huntsville I2C for autonomous defense technologies, driving innovation and research in North Alabama.
news.summary: Allen Control Systems (ACS), a prominent player in precision robotics for defense, has entered into a collaboration with the University of Alabama in Huntsville’s Invention to Innovation Center (I2C), located in Huntsville, Alabama. This partnership is aimed at spearheading progress in autonomous defense technologies. Situated in the hub of North Alabama’s flourishing defense and aerospace sector, known for its innovation, military partnerships, and leading-edge research, this move underscores ACS's commitment to advancing in this area. This partnership marks a significant step in driving advancements in the autonomous defense sector, with ACS leveraging the groundbreaking resources and collaborative opportunities offered by the University of Alabama in Huntsville.

news.headline: Hershey Company plans to sell notes in public offering to repay debts. Date: Feb. 19, 2025. Stock symbol: HSY.
news.summary: In Hershey, Pennsylvania on February 19, 2025, The Hershey Company disclosed its plan to conduct a public offering of notes. The company, listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol HSY, aims to utilize the funds generated from this offering to fully repay its outstanding debts.

news.headline: BreachLock named in IT-Harvest's 2025 Cyber 150 List as a fastest-growing cybersecurity company.
news.summary: On February 19, 2025, BreachLock, a renowned company specializing in attack surface discovery and penetration testing, was recognized as one of the top-performing cybersecurity firms in the 2025 Cyber 150 List by IT-Harvest. This prestigious list is curated by IT-Harvest, a prominent player in the cybersecurity industry.

news.headline: HoneyBook announced new partnerships & integrations to simplify operations for entrepreneurs using more than 4 software apps daily.
news.summary: In San Francisco, HoneyBook, a prominent business management platform for entrepreneurs, has unveiled new strategic partnerships and integrations aimed at streamlining operations, boosting productivity, and improving client satisfaction. Many independent business owners grapple with the complexity of handling various tools and workflows. Studies reveal that almost 50% of small business proprietors utilize over four software applications each day to oversee their activities, resulting in inefficiencies.

news.headline: CAIS launches enterprise solution for TAMPs & managed account platforms integrating alt investments, creating efficiency.
news.summary: New York - CAIS, a prominent alternative investment platform for independent financial advisors, unveiled a new enterprise solution aimed at incorporating alternative investments into Turnkey Asset Management Platforms (TAMPs) and managed account platforms. This innovative technology empowers advisors to efficiently oversee both traditional and alternative investments within these platforms. With 15 years of experience, CAIS continues to lead the industry.

news.headline: Rémy Martin launches V.S.O.P 'This is My City' limited-editions in 4 cities, promoting music and culture with microgrant initiative. NYC, Feb. 19, 2025.
news.summary: Rémy Martin introduces a new line of limited-edition V.S.O.P This is My City bottles, underscoring its dedication to local communities with microgrant initiatives. The launch aims to honor diverse hip-hop cultures in various vibrant cities. The announcement was made in New York on Feb. 19, 2025.

news.headline: AI running platform Ochy secures $1.7M funding, partners with adidas adiClub program to empower athletes worldwide.
news.summary: Ochy, an innovative AI-powered running gait platform based in Rennes, France, is transforming the way athletes improve performance and avoid injuries. The company recently concluded a prosperous pre-seed fundraising round, raising $1.7 million USD. This achievement is complemented by Ochy's inclusion in the adiClub initiative, part of the adidas loyalty program, connecting the French startup with a broader audience. Ochy's ultimate goal is to empower runners and fitness enthusiasts globally to reach their objectives and minimize injuries.

news.headline: IndySoft partners with ADS Mexico to distribute software in Mexico; expanding reach in calibration solutions market.
news.summary: On February 19, 2025, in Charleston, South Carolina, IndySoft, a leading provider of calibration and asset management software worldwide, revealed a new strategic collaboration with ADS Mexico, a top supplier of software and hardware solutions. This partnership aims to bolster their services and reach a wider audience. IndySoft’s website is www.indysoft.com, while ADS Mexico's is www.adsmex.com.

news.headline: Pega introduces new multi-region Disaster Recovery service for Pega Cloud to safeguard critical operations with paired regions 125 miles apart.
news.summary: Pegasystems Inc., a leading enterprise transformation solution provider, introduced a new Pega Enhanced Disaster Recovery (EDR) service for Pega Cloud™, tailored for clients in regulated industries. The service offers paired deployment regions at least 125 miles apart to enhance protection. This ensures a speedy recovery with minimal downtime for businesses, meeting critical operational needs. This initiative showcases the company's commitment to providing robust services for industry-specific requirements.

news.headline: Delta Faucet wins America's Best Customer Service Award 2025 from USA Today in Indianapolis.
news.summary: Delta Faucet, a prominent manufacturer of faucet and plumbing fixtures, has recently been acknowledged for its exceptional customer service in the United States. According to USA Today, the company has been recognized as a leader in this area. The recognition comes after Delta Faucet stood out for providing top-notch customer service across the nation. This recognition is a testament to the company's dedication to customer satisfaction and excellence in service delivery. This acknowledgement from such a reputable source like USA Today further solidifies Delta Faucet's reputation as a customer-centric organization.

news.headline: PandaDoc integrates CPQ suite with Salesforce to streamline sales cycles; quote accurately and execute contracts within Salesforce.
news.summary: San Francisco-based PandaDoc, a prominent document management software provider, has recently introduced a significant upgrade to its CPQ suite by launching PandaDoc Configure, Price, Quote (CPQ) for Salesforce. This new solution is integrated directly into Salesforce, the leading CRM platform in the industry. With PandaDoc CPQ for Salesforce, revenue teams can now create precise quotes efficiently and merge various point solutions to streamline contract execution within Salesforce. This development enhances PandaDoc’s current offerings on e-signature solutions.

news.headline: Securiti partners with Databricks to integrate Mosaic AI and Delta tables into Gencore AI, simplifying building safe GenAI systems.
news.summary: In San Jose, California, Securiti, a leading data security and compliance company, has revealed its collaboration with Databricks, an AI company. The partnership will involve integrating Databricks Mosaic AI and Delta tables into Securiti’s Gencore AI solution. This joint effort aims to facilitate customers in effortlessly constructing secure generative AI (GenAI) systems and AI agents utilizing exclusive enterprise data. By incorporating Databricks technology, users will have better access to robust tools for creating enterprise-level AI solutions. This alliance seeks to address the primary obstacle in deploying GenAI systems efficiently.

news.headline: Valkyrie launches first knowledge graph on moon via Intuitive Machine's IM-2 Mission from Kennedy Space Center.
news.summary: In a groundbreaking achievement, Valkyrie has created history by deploying the inaugural knowledge graph on the moon through Intuitive Machine’s IM-2 Mission launched from the Kennedy Space Center in Austin, Texas. This marks a significant milestone in space exploration, with Valkyrie paving the way for innovative data dissemination beyond Earth's boundaries.

news.headline: VikingCloud files patent for Universal Merchant ID System, has 28 granted patents, 3 pending, managing cybersecurity for 4M+ merchants globally.
news.summary: VikingCloud, a prominent cybersecurity and PCI compliance firm, has introduced a new patent application for its Universal Merchant Identification System. With a total of 28 patents already granted and 3 more in the pipeline, the company provides cybersecurity and PCI compliance services to over four million merchants worldwide. These services are offered in collaboration with major processors, acquirers, and independent sales organizations (ISOs). Recently, the company also made public its latest development in...

news.headline: Daktronics, Inc. will announce Q3 2025 financial results on March 5, 2025 before market opens, followed by a 10:00 AM CT conference call.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on February 19, 2025, Daktronics, Inc. (NASDAQ-DAKT) revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the third quarter of fiscal 2025 on March 5, 2025, before the market opens. Interested parties can join the conference call and webcast scheduled for 10:00 AM CT on the same day to learn more about the results.

news.headline: AlertMedia introduces AI Assistant to improve emergency communication by enabling faster drafting, editing, and translating of notifications within the platform.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, AlertMedia revealed their latest innovation - the AI Assistant. This generative AI tool aims to enhance communication speed and efficiency for organizations during emergencies. With this new feature, crisis leaders can swiftly create, adjust, and translate emergency messages within the AlertMedia platform in a matter of seconds. The AI Assistant is set to revolutionize crisis management and response with its dynamic capabilities. This tool signifies a significant advancement in emergency communication technology, offering organizations a valuable asset in addressing critical events promptly and effectively.

news.headline: Rootstock ranked as the top ERP solution for SMBs in the 2025 TEC Insight Report. #1 in SMB category.
news.summary: A company based in San Ramon, California known as Rootstock has been acknowledged as the top ERP solution for small to midsize businesses in the 2025 TEC Insight Report. This recognition positions Rootstock as the number one choice for SMBs seeking ERP solutions.

news.headline: Casella Waste Systems named to Forbes "America's Best Midsize Employers" list for 2025.(Nasdaq: CWST) in Rutland, Vt., recognized for their services.
news.summary: A company based in Rutland, Vermont, Casella Waste Systems, Inc. (CWST), listed on Nasdaq, specializing in solid waste, recycling, and resource management services, has recently been recognized by Forbes. The company has made it to Forbes' "America’s Best Midsize Employers" for the year 2025. This highlights their commendable workplace environment and practices. It demonstrates their commitment to employee satisfaction and well-being. This acknowledgment signifies their standing in the industry and their dedication to providing a positive work environment.

news.headline: EnWave signs deal with Sprouted Proteins SAC in Peru, includes Equipment Purchase Agreement and License Amendment.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia on February 19, 2025, EnWave Corporation disclosed that it has entered into an Equipment Purchase Agreement (EPA) and a License Amendment with Sprouted Proteins SAC based in Peru. This agreement follows Sprouted Proteins' signing of a royalty-bearing license agreement with EnWave on February 26, 2024. EnWave (TSX-V:ENW | FSE:E4U) sealed the deal with Sprouted Proteins, a significant step in their collaboration.

news.headline: Cirion Technologies upgrades network with Ciena's WaveLogic 6 to meet cloud and AI demands.
news.summary: A company based in Hanover, Maryland known as Cirion Technologies has announced its intentions to implement a range of solutions from Ciena, a prominent networking systems provider. This deployment will include the utilization of WaveLogic 6 Extreme, a cutting-edge technology offered by Ciena.

news.headline: 1Password Enterprise Password Manager - MSP Edition is now generally available in Toronto to meet high industry demand.
news.summary: 1Password Enterprise Password Manager - MSP Edition is now widely accessible in Toronto, catering to the rising demand in the industry.

news.headline: Survey shows 68% gap in EV industry adoption, posing challenges to growth, with vehicle compatibility and skills shortage as key hurdles.
news.summary: The growth of EV charging infrastructure faces significant hurdles related to vehicle compatibility, charger reliability, and a skills shortage. These challenges are crucial in accelerating the expansion of EV charging stations across the country. The issues surrounding vehicle compatibility with charging systems, the reliability of chargers, and a shortage of skilled workers pose obstacles to the rapid increase of charging points. Tackling these obstacles is necessary to facilitate the growth of EV charging infrastructure, as they impact the overall effectiveness and accessibility of electric vehicle charging. Addressing these concerns will be essential in meeting the increasing demand for reliable and efficient charging options as the adoption of electric vehicles continues to rise.

news.headline: Mullen's Q4 2024: $4.4M invoiced, $6M received on vehicle deliveries, strongest quarter results.
news.summary: The company has recorded its most successful quarter ever with $4.4 million invoiced and $6 million received for vehicles delivered.

news.headline: Fairmarkit and Inception partner to revolutionize enterprise procurement with AI integration in the Middle East.
news.summary: In Abu Dhabi, Fairmarkit, a prominent autonomous sourcing solution company, has entered into a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with Inception, a G42 firm that focuses on AI-centric products. The agreement was formalized at the IDC Middle East CIO Summit 2025 event. This partnership aims to merge Fairmarkit’s AI-driven autonomous sourcing technology with Inception's AI-powered procurement ecosystem. The joint venture, known as "InBusiness Procurement," is set to revolutionize enterprise sourcing in the Middle East and North Africa region. This collaboration signifies a significant step forward in the industry as it combines cutting-edge technologies to enhance procurement processes.

news.headline: Yukon Metals plans exploration at 11,755-hectare AZ project near Beaver Creek, Yukon. Company owns 17 properties totaling 42,500 hectares.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on February 19, 2025, Yukon Metals Corp. (CSE: YMC, FSE: E770, OTCQB: YMMCF) has revealed plans for its forthcoming exploration initiative at the AZ project spanning 11,755 hectares. Positioned about 36km south of Beaver Creek, Yukon, this site stands as the biggest within Yukon Metals’ portfolio of seventeen properties, covering a combined area exceeding 42,500 hectares.

news.headline: Roku and Fremantle partnership brings exclusive "American Idol" season 8 streaming rights to Canada on The Roku Channel.
news.summary: In Toronto, Roku has revealed a new collaboration with Fremantle to feature “American Idol” season 8 on The Roku Channel. This marks the platform's initial exclusive live and simulcast agreement within a single territory. As part of the deal, The Roku Channel acquires AVOD (advertising-based video on demand) digital exclusive rights to the series. Viewers can catch “American Idol” season 8 on ABC on Sundays and Mondays, followed by next-day streaming on Hulu in the U.S. As for Canada, The Roku Channel will offer a free simulcast of the show, while on-demand streaming will be available the following day.

news.headline: Varonis makes it to CRN’s 2025 Security 100 list.
FortiAnalyzer evolves into AI-driven SecOps platform for midsize enterprises, empowering with threat hunting and incident response.
news.summary: Leveraging a consolidated data reservoir, threat intelligence from FortiGuard Labs, and AI technologies, FortiAnalyzer provides midsize businesses with enhanced capabilities for threat detection and incident handling. This solution enables swift threat hunting and response processes, ensuring efficient security measures for organizations.

news.headline: Taura Health introduces software at NCPA Conference to boost pharmacy revenue and workload balance.
news.summary: A new software solution by Taura Health has been introduced in Lake Geneva, aiming to enhance clinical revenue and workload balancing for pharmacies. Demonstrations of the software will take place at the NCPA Multiple Locations Conference in Clearwater, Florida. Taura Health seeks to assist pharmacies in expanding revenue sources and improving relationships with payers and providers. The platform provided by the company aids in optimizing operations and enhancing overall efficiency.

news.headline: Edible Garden CEO Jim Kras named to 2025 NJBIZ Power 100, for leadership in sustainable agriculture; Nasdaq: EDBL, EDBLW.
news.summary: On February 19, 2025, in Belvidere, New Jersey, Edible Garden AG Incorporated revealed that its CEO, Jim Kras, was selected for the 2025 NJBIZ Power 100 list. Operating under Nasdaq symbols EDBL and EDBLW, Edible Garden specializes in controlled environment agriculture (CEA) and offers locally grown, organic, and sustainable produce. The NJBIZ Power 100 list is an annual publication by NJBIZ that acknowledges the top business figures in New Jersey influencing the state's economy, industries, and communities. This recognition reflects Kras's significant impact on the business landscape with his leadership.
